scripts.start: echo 'INFO: npm start запускает проект ЛОКАЛЬНО (CPU режим). Для GPU используйте: npm run docker:up' && concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue "npm:server" "npm:client"
scripts.docker:down: docker stop tic-tac-toe-server 2>/dev/null; docker rm tic-tac-toe-server 2>/dev/null; docker-compose -f docker-compose.gpu.yml down
scripts.docker:stop: docker stop tic-tac-toe-server 2>/dev/null; docker-compose -f docker-compose.gpu.yml stop
scripts.docker:start: docker start tic-tac-toe-server 2>/dev/null; docker-compose -f docker-compose.gpu.yml start
scripts.docker:restart: docker restart tic-tac-toe-server 2>/dev/null; docker-compose -f docker-compose.gpu.yml restart
